title: DualWieldCombat
description: DualWieldCombat is a Bukkit/Paper plugin for Minecraft 1.21.4–1.21.5 that enables true dual wielding in PvP by allowing players to attack alternately with their main hand (left-click) and offhand (right-click)
body: DualWieldCombat brings true dual wielding to Minecraft PvP by enabling players to attack alternately with their main hand and offhand. Featuring custom offhand weapons and precise target detection, it enhances combat dynamics with cooldown management for balanced gameplay on Bukkit/Paper 1.21.4–1.21.5 servers.
